title: RT campaign: gate failure-mode matrices + golden-replay harness + fake-fidelity + SSOT-projection + core seams (docs/architecture/testing-architecture.md)
description:
USER DIRECTIVE (2026-07-02): 'build robust and strong tests for all the regressions that happened in the pipeline … design robust and general tests to cover broader cases … structure the test plan to scale, adding tests with no code changes … per module, public APIs, dependency breakdown for layer-by-layer testability, best practices.' FULL DESIGN: docs/architecture/testing-architecture.md (READ IT FIRST — taxonomy of 15 regressions R1-R13 into classes A-L, each paired with a general test pattern). Implement as slices T1-T6, strict TDD, one slice per cycle:

T1 (FIRST, highest value) — GATE FAILURE-MODE MATRICES + GOLDEN-REPLAY HARNESS: for every gate (EGPS generator, triage-cap, contract, eval, commit-gate, CI-parity, ship) a failure-mode table {artifact missing, malformed, TIMEOUT, flaky-red, partial, compliant-but-counter-divergent} x {expected verdict, expected diagnostic substring}. Invariants: timeout NEVER reads as absence; flake NEVER reads as regression (retry-once); every reject reason states its counting rule/fix. Build the data-driven harness at go/acs/regression/testdata/regressions/<case>/manifest.json discovered by fs.Glob — adding a future regression = drop a directory, ZERO Go changes. STEP 1: copy the verified seed artifacts into git-tracked testdata: cycle-449 triage-report (.evolve/runs/cycle-449/triage-report.md — must count 3 committed floors, NOT 7), cycle-444 timeout scenario (.evolve/runs/cycle-444.reset-*/audit-report.md + ABSENT acs-verdict.json), cycle-447 flake scenario (acs-verdict.json red_count:1, suite passes on re-run), failedApproaches[448,449] demotion-hole. These goldens are the TEST HALF of inbox items egps-timeout-false-fail + triagecap-prose-counter-defect (coordinate: their production fixes turn these goldens green; do not duplicate).

T2 — DIFFERENTIAL FAKE-FIDELITY SUITE: fakeTmux and real tmux adapter pass the SAME behavioral contract suite for every property tests rely on (idempotent CapturePane — the R5 paneSeq divergence, marker echo, exit-code mapping); same for sysexec fake vs real (R6 CombinedOutput err==nil trap gets an anti-misuse pin + static ban in gate-critical packages).

T3 — SSOT-PROJECTION SWEEP: find every cross-package literal pin of manifest/catalog/policy values (R2: internal/setup pinned agy tier literals) and convert to derive-from-SSOT (load the artifact, assert the projection). Zero test edits on future SSOT changes.

T4 — DETERMINISM + LOUD-DEGRADATION PROPERTIES: classifier/selector same-input=>same-output (hash-stability, call-counting fakes); every fallback path asserts its diagnostic is EMITTED (R10 silent detect fallback class).

T5 — CORE SEAM-INJECTION REFACTOR: constructor DI for orchestrator collaborators in internal/core (the weakest-seam package, 82.9% floor) — behavior-identical, unlocks layer-by-layer testing. Golden: byte-identical RoutingConfig/dispatch for unchanged inputs.

T6 — maintain testing-architecture.md as the filing system: retro files a class row + golden case per abnormal cycle.

CONSTRAINTS: TDD red-first (each golden must be RED against the pre-fix behavior where the production fix hasn't landed, using injected/legacy shims where needed); table-driven; go test -race green; apicover -enforce clean; conformance suites enroll via REGISTRY ENUMERATION never hand-lists; no weakening of any gate's purpose. Related inbox: egps-timeout-false-fail (0.85), triagecap-prose-counter-defect (0.88) — T1 provides their regression goldens; latest-model-preference D9 provides class L.
